task.summary: Default task

feat: update LoadPresentation workflow
- Updated LoadPresentation class to enhance documentation and streamline presentation preparation workflow (improves clarity and maintainability).
chore: add Rider project settings
doc: add workflows.svg diagram

feat(sheet): add GetHeadersName method to WorksheetService
- Introduced GetHeadersName method to retrieve column headers from the first row of a specified content range (enhances data retrieval capabilities). - Refactored GetRowContent method to maintain functionality while improving code structure.

feat: introduce download management and configuration settings
- Add FileDownloadInfo and FileDownloader classes for managing file downloads (encapsulates download lifecycle). - Implement DownloadManager to handle concurrent downloads and check completion status. - Rename Config classes to Setting for consistency in domain structure.

feat(sheet): add GetHeadersName method to WorksheetService
- Introduced GetHeadersName method to retrieve column headers from the first row of a specified content range (enhances data retrieval capabilities). - Refactored GetRowContent method to maintain functionality while improving code structure.

feat(sheet): add GetHeadersName method to WorksheetService
- Introduced GetHeadersName method to retrieve column headers from the first row of a specified content range (enhances data retrieval capabilities). - Refactored GetRowContent method to maintain functionality while improving code structure.
[skip ci] chore: add copilot-instructions.md

refactor(download): complete almost workflows for PrepareImages.cs
- Updated class names for clarity and consistency (improves code readability). - Refactored DownloadManager to use new class names. - Enhanced copilot instructions for better architectural guidance.
refactor!(backend): Merge Framework into Domain, Application, Infastructure (part 1)
chore(backend): Make ReadOnlyWorksheet constructor internal

feat(backend): complete generating activities and clean architecture structure
- Changed ISlide and IImageShape to inherit from ISlideObject (ensures a unified interface structure). - Updated namespaces in various files to reflect the new structure (improves clarity and organization). - Renamed methods in ISpecializable to Flatten for better semantic meaning (enhances code readability).

feat(backend): complete generating activities and clean architecture structure
- Changed ISlide and IImageShape to inherit from ISlideObject (ensures a unified interface structure). - Updated namespaces in various files to reflect the new structure (improves clarity and organization). - Renamed methods in ISpecializable to Flatten for better semantic meaning (enhances code readability).

feat(backend): complete generating activities and clean architecture structure
- Changed ISlide and IImageShape to inherit from ISlideObject (ensures a unified interface structure). - Updated namespaces in various files to reflect the new structure (improves clarity and organization). - Renamed methods in ISpecializable to Flatten for better semantic meaning (enhances code readability).

chore(backend): improve business logic on sheet, slide, tasks
- Updated activity constructors to accept identifiers instead of raw strings (improves type safety). - Refined error handling for invalid inputs in several activities (enhances robustness). - Introduced a new FileSystem class for file operations (promotes single responsibility). - Normalized file naming conventions across the application (ensures consistency).

chore(backend): improve business logic and field naming on sheet, slide, tasks
- Updated activity constructors to accept identifiers instead of raw strings (improves type safety). - Refined error handling for invalid inputs in several activities (enhances robustness). - Introduced a new FileSystem class for file operations (promotes single responsibility). - Normalized file naming conventions across the application (ensures consistency).

feat: add GenerationWorkflow workflow, rename Generating -> Generation
- Moved various activity classes to the new Generation namespace for better organization and clarity (improves maintainability). - Updated constructors in several activities to use required properties instead of nullable ones (enhances type safety). - Updated CleanupResources activity to manage multi temporary resources during workflow execution (promotes resource management).

feat: add GenerationWorkflow workflow, rename Generating -> Generation
- Moved various activity classes to the new Generation namespace for better organization and clarity (improves maintainability). - Updated constructors in several activities to use required properties instead of nullable ones (enhances type safety). - Updated CleanupResources activity to manage multi temporary resources during workflow execution (promotes resource management).

feat(backend)!: add ScanningService, refactoring Slide entities
- Updated namespaces for clarity and consistency (e.g., SlideGenerator.Domain.Slide.Models to SlideGenerator.Domain.Slide.Models.Previews). - Modified method signatures to remove default parameters for better readability (e.g., GetOrOpen method). - Introduced new interfaces and classes for better abstraction (e.g., IImageReplacer, ITextReplacer).
chore(backend): update packages

refactor: refactoring Images module
- Renamed FaceDetectorModelKey to FaceDetectorModel for clarity. - Updated RoiType enum values for better understanding (RuleOfThirds to Center and vice versa). - Introduced new classes for CenterOption and RuleOfThirdsOption to encapsulate ROI strategies. - Refactored FaceDetector and related classes to improve maintainability and readability.
[skip ci] chore(backend): cleanup and reformat
refactor(workflows): refactoring workflows models to Application Layer

MESSAGE.value:
feat: update LoadPresentation workflow
- Updated LoadPresentation class to enhance documentation and streamline presentation preparation workflow (improves clarity and maintainability).

feat: introduce download management and configuration settings
- Add FileDownloadInfo and FileDownloader classes for managing file downloads (encapsulates download lifecycle). - Implement DownloadManager to handle concurrent downloads and check completion status. - Rename Config classes to Setting for consistency in domain structure.

feat(sheet): add GetHeadersName method to WorksheetService
- Introduced GetHeadersName method to retrieve column headers from the first row of a specified content range (enhances data retrieval capabilities). - Refactored GetRowContent method to maintain functionality while improving code structure.

refactor(download): complete almost workflows for PrepareImages.cs
- Updated class names for clarity and consistency (improves code readability). - Refactored DownloadManager to use new class names. - Enhanced copilot instructions for better architectural guidance.
refactor!(backend): Merge Framework into Domain, Application, Infastructure (part 1)

feat(backend): complete generating activities and clean architecture structure
- Changed ISlide and IImageShape to inherit from ISlideObject (ensures a unified interface structure). - Updated namespaces in various files to reflect the new structure (improves clarity and organization). - Renamed methods in ISpecializable to Flatten for better semantic meaning (enhances code readability).

feat(backend): complete generating activities and clean architecture structure
- Changed ISlide and IImageShape to inherit from ISlideObject (ensures a unified interface structure). - Updated namespaces in various files to reflect the new structure (improves clarity and organization). - Renamed methods in ISpecializable to Flatten for better semantic meaning (enhances code readability).

chore(backend): improve business logic on sheet, slide, tasks
- Updated activity constructors to accept identifiers instead of raw strings (improves type safety). - Refined error handling for invalid inputs in several activities (enhances robustness). - Introduced a new FileSystem class for file operations (promotes single responsibility). - Normalized file naming conventions across the application (ensures consistency).

chore(backend): improve business logic and field naming on sheet, slide, tasks
- Updated activity constructors to accept identifiers instead of raw strings (improves type safety). - Refined error handling for invalid inputs in several activities (enhances robustness). - Introduced a new FileSystem class for file operations (promotes single responsibility). - Normalized file naming conventions across the application (ensures consistency).

feat: add GenerationWorkflow workflow, rename Generating -> Generation
- Moved various activity classes to the new Generation namespace for better organization and clarity (improves maintainability). - Updated constructors in several activities to use required properties instead of nullable ones (enhances type safety). - Updated CleanupResources activity to manage multi temporary resources during workflow execution (promotes resource management).

feat(backend)!: add ScanningService, refactoring Slide entities
- Updated namespaces for clarity and consistency (e.g., SlideGenerator.Domain.Slide.Models to SlideGenerator.Domain.Slide.Models.Previews). - Modified method signatures to remove default parameters for better readability (e.g., GetOrOpen method). - Introduced new interfaces and classes for better abstraction (e.g., IImageReplacer, ITextReplacer).

refactor: refactoring Images module
- Renamed FaceDetectorModelKey to FaceDetectorModel for clarity. - Updated RoiType enum values for better understanding (RuleOfThirds to Center and vice versa). - Introduced new classes for CenterOption and RuleOfThirdsOption to encapsulate ROI strategies. - Refactored FaceDetector and related classes to improve maintainability and readability.
refactor(workflows): refactoring workflows models to Application Layer

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: refactor(workflows): refactoring workflows models to Application Layer
